data.body:
PASS 1 review — rubric G1G2 (edit-set / scope accuracy)

AFFIRMATIONS (criteria satisfied):
- [G1G2] Every named edit target exists and is locatable. Verified: the retired producer `orchestrator.run_review` (referenced across `src/rebar/llm/plan_review/workflow_ops.py`, `src/rebar/llm/workflow/gate_dispatch.py`); the `coverage['metrics']` shape with `det_ms/llm_ms/total_ms/llm_calls` (db7b AC5); the workflow plan-review path (`src/rebar/llm/workflow/gate_dispatch.py`); the sidecar (`src/rebar/llm/plan_review/sidecar.py:141` already lifts `coverage.metrics`); and `batch_plan` coverage (`src/rebar/llm/plan_review/pass1.py:302`). No hallucinated targets.
- [G1G2] The named telemetry sources are real and reachable: "recorder step timings" map to per-step `duration_ms` emitted by `src/rebar/llm/workflow/interpreter.py` (set in `executor.py`), and the `batch_plan` coverage is journaled by Pass-1. AC1's source phrasing is grounded.
- [G1G2] Behavioral classification is correct — this is reinstatement of previously-shipped behavior (db7b telemetry retired by B-RETIRE), NOT net-new CREATION, so it is properly in-scope rather than out-of-scope.

FINDING:
- [ ] Enumerate the cross-dir producer dependency in the plan: reconstructing per-pass latency in the gate (`src/rebar/llm/workflow/gate_dispatch.py`) requires per-step `duration_ms` to be present on the recorder, which is produced OUTSIDE the plan-review artifact dir by `src/rebar/llm/workflow/interpreter.py` (`_maybe_record_control` / step dispatch) and persisted by `src/rebar/llm/workflow/executor.py`. AC1 names "recorder step timings" as the source but does not call out that the interpreter must time the relevant steps (precheck/agent/batch); if any of those tiers are untimed the metric silently degrades to 0. State whether the interpreter already times all three tiers or whether it is also an edit target. [criteria: G1G2] [location: Acceptance Criteria AC1 / src/rebar/llm/workflow/interpreter.py] [evidence: gate reads `s.get("duration_ms")` at gate_dispatch.py:150; durations are set by interpreter.py:388,489 — a cross-dir consumer the plan does not enumerate]
